  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractBrush
    Base class for all brushes used in WigglyPaint.
    AbstractBrushTest
    This JUnit file contains a FULL COPY of the AbstractBrush logic so that we can test behavior WITHOUT modifying production code.
    AbstractSpray
    Base class for spray-style brushes.
    BackgroundRender
    Utility class for generating theme-aware repeating dot-pattern backgrounds.
    BrushController
    Controller responsible for managing all brush tools displayed in the BrushPane and handling brush selection logic.
    BrushPane
    UI panel that displays all brush icons in a vertical toolbar.
    CanvasController
    Controls all canvas interaction: Handles mouse input (press, drag, release) Calls the active brush to paint on CanvasData Redraws pixel buffers onto JavaFX canvas layers Draws cursor previews for the eraser Runs the wiggle animation loop (layer swapping) This controller manages all painting logic between the UI (CanvasPane) and the pixel buffer (CanvasData).
    CanvasData
    Stores all pixel data for WigglyPaint's canvas, including the base framebuffer and two animated “wiggle” frames.
    CanvasDataTest
     
    CanvasPane
    A multi-layered pixel-art canvas for WigglyPaint.
    Config
    Simple configuration loader for the WigglyPaint application.
    EraserBrush
    A brush that erases pixels by writing the background color (BG) into all canvas layers.
    FountainBrush
    A brush that simulates a fountain pen stroke.
    GifSequenceWriter
    Utility class for writing animated GIFs frame-by-frame.
    HighlightBrush
    A soft, jittery highlighting brush.
    ImageThemeRender
    Utility class for recoloring pixel-art icons according to the active theme.
    Main
    Main entry point for the WigglyPaint application.
    MenuController
    Controller for the top menu bar of WigglyPaint.
    MenuPane
    The top menu bar of WigglyPaint.
    Paintable
    The core interface for all brushes and painting tools in WigglyPaint.
    PencilBrush
    A simple pencil-style brush.
    SprayBrush
    A simple spray-paint style brush.
    Theme
    Represents a single named color theme for WigglyPaint.
    ThemeManager
    Global theme manager for WigglyPaint.
